mck_info.address2: Vinh Loc 2 Industrial Park My Yen Commune Tay Ninh Province
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: The PAN Group Joint Stock Company engages in agricultural, food, financial investment, and other related activities in Vietnam and internationally. The company is involved in the mixed crop and livestock farming; cultivation, processing, and trading of agricultural, forestry, and aquatic products; food trading investment consulting activities; cultivation, processing, and preservation of aquatic products; purchase and sale of food, foodstuffs, and semi-processed agricultural products; and quality testing, export, and preservation of aquatic products. It also produces and sells sugar, cakes, candies, malt, wine, nutritional powder, milk and dairy products, soy milk, soft drinks, and soft drink powder; sells, imports, and exports agricultural products and materials; and offers warehouse rental services. In addition, the company engages in the wholesale of food, agricultural, and forestry products; coffee plantation activities; production and trading of vegetables, fruits, and other agricultural products; research, selecting, and sale of various agricultural and forestry plant varieties; and manufacture, processing, and trading of disinfectant products, agricultural chemicals, and related services. Further, it offers agricultural and forestry, and food processing machines, as well as repair, maintenance, and installation services for machinery and equipment; research, training, and agricultural technical services; and produces and trades in seeds and logistics services. Additionally, the company engages in the wholesale of gasoline, lubricants, liquefied petroleum gas and related products, rice, wheat, and other cereals and flour, as well as operates hotels, motels, restaurants, short-term accommodation services, and biotechnology research and development. The company was formerly known as Pan Pacific Corporation and changed its name to The PAN Group Joint Stock Company in August 2015. The PAN Group Joint Stock Company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tây Ninh, Vietnam.
